headline: A Look At PPG Industries (PPG) Valuation After Recent Share Price Weakness
summary: What the latest numbers say about PPG Industries (PPG) PPG Industries (PPG) has been on investors’ radar after recent share performance, including a roughly 2.7% decline over the past month and a 1.7% decline over the past 3 months. At a last close of $103.86, the coatings and materials group carries a market value of about $23.1b, with annual revenue of $15,875.0 and net income of $1,571.0 reported in its latest full year. See our latest analysis for PPG Industries. Short term momentum looks...
